note: Axes are created/destroyed implicitly by chartType changes — no direct Add/Remove. Extended charts (funnel/treemap/sunburst/boxWhisker/histogram) reject axis paths; use chart-level Set. At chart-creation time, configure axes via the chart's axis* props (axismin/axismax/axistitle/axisfont/…); chart-axis covers post-creation only. Known gaps: `labelFont` writes the title run (not tick labels); `lineWidth`/`lineDash` Set on an axis path applies to all plot-area series — use chart-series for series-specific line styling.

role.description: axis role token — value, value2, category, series. Surfaces on Get to identify which axis this node represents.
